description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsWhite shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforationsPadded tongue and inner Foamy rubber outsole and an air unit on the heelNon marking compound outsole with herringbone and horizontal grooves, pivot point on the forefoot and a lug at the heelThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
